title: I need
wikitext:
[]: I need...             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Jan 27, 2006 6:17 pm WE LOST THE IMAGE REQUEST THREAD WTF. Okay, does anyone have this picture of Shinji and he's all chibi, right? And hes in the "You Two Dance Like You Wanna Win!" episode, and he looks like he's dancing. Its from what I think was a screensaver. I need it for netspeak Shinji D:

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Jan 27, 2006 7:12 pm Here you go

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jan 28, 2006 6:58 am How did you procure that so fast?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jan 28, 2006 7:05 am It was sitting in my Photobucket account. I've got a ton of images from my favorite animes, my own artwork, and pets. I use the account as a backup in case my computer fries itself again. (Bad incident involving a power supply that literally smoked and had char on itself.)

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Jan 29, 2006 11:16 am Does anyone happen to have a larger/better resolution version of this? Warning: I may kiss you if you do :P

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sun Jan 29, 2006 12:20 pm I wonder what does this mean... A good picture, by the way. Never seen it though, so I can't help... :(

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sun Jan 29, 2006 1:40 pm I'm afraid a larger version may well be out of the question, this picture came from the Gainax website.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Feb 07, 2006 12:56 pm :O OMG THANKYOU. YAY

[]: Re: I need...             Quote Post by Titus » Tue Feb 07, 2006 2:10 pm Shnooks wrote: WE LOST THE IMAGE REQUEST THREAD WTF. D:
